manga.title: Heroes of Nine Clouds
manga.description:
Ojun is a ten-year-old boy who found himself waking up 100 years later in an ancient tomb. He finds that the future is full of conflicts between clansmen and other chaos. An action-packed series following a young boy and his friends in a dangerous and chaotic world!

[Official English](https://comics.inkr.com/title/213-heroes-of-nine-clouds?utm_source=mud)
